name: Bash Only Tentacle
description: LLM-guided execution where every action becomes a readable shell script before it runs.

brain.prompt: Convert an execution Need into a small, auditable shell script. Keep the script readable, replayable, and narrow.
brain.feedback_contract: Return script path, exit status, stdout/stderr summary, and whether the script can be reused.

skills.description: Represent execution as editable scripts under .octopus/harness.

tools.description: Write stdin to a .sh file and execute it.
tools.input: script on stdin plus optional workspace root
tools.output: script output and stored script path

surfaces.description: Prompt that turns an execution Need into a readable script.
Script runner metadata and JSON contract shape.
Checks and constraints for replayable generated scripts.

constraints: Generated scripts should stay readable and replayable.
